expected_effect: Recover weak calm slices through narrow non-toxic-side relief instead of a broad cheap mode.
expected_failure_signature: If relief appears on both sides or survives renewed stress, arb leakage and weak-slice collapse return.
expected_win_condition: Lift low-retail and low-volatility performance while keeping low-decile support and arb-loss ratio inside baseline guardrails.
hidden_coupling_removed: Calm recovery should not be earned and spent as a broad global discount path.
rationale: Replace global calm credit with a narrow corridor that can reduce only the non-toxic side after repeated calm confirmations and closes immediately on renewed stress.
title: Recovery corridor on non-toxic side
why_not_coefficient_retune: This changes where recovery is allowed to appear in the quote rather than merely shrinking or growing the same rebate envelope.
